zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore de Bohun於1248年6月10日出生在英國艾可德布登時，她的父親Humphrey de Bohun V24歲，母親Eleanor de Braose20歲。她於1269年6月26日與Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1314年2月20日享年65歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore de Bohun was born on 10 June 1248, in Debden, Essex, England, her father, Humphrey de Bohun V, was 24 and her mother, Eleanor de Braose, was 20. She married Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby on 26 June 1269, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 20 February 1314, at the age of 65, and was buried in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore de Bohun est née le 10 juin 1248, à Debden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey de Bohun V, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Braose, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby le 26 juin 1269, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1314, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianore de Bohun am 10. Juni 1248 in Debden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey de Bohun V 24 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Braose 20. Sie hat am 26. Juni 1269 in Staffordshire, England Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1314 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby il 26 giugno 1269, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Alianore de Bohunが1248年6月10日にイギリスエセックスデブデンで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Bohun Vは24歳，母Eleanor de Braoseは20歳であった。1269年6月26日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1314年2月20日に65歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Alianore de Bohun(이)가 1248년 6월 10일 영국 에세스 데브든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey de Bohun V(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Braose(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1269년 6월 26일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1314년 2월 20일 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore de Bohun nasceu em 10 de junho de 1248, em Debden, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey de Bohun V, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Braose, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby em 26 de junho de 1269, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1314, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore de Bohun родилась 10 июня 1248 г. в местности дебден, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey de Bohun V было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Braose, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby 26 июня 1269 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 февраля 1314 г. в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianore de Bohun nació el 10 de junio de 1248, en Debden, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey de Bohun V, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Braose, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby el 26 de junio de 1269, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1314, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.
